signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow upgrade, aimed at reducing Solana transaction finality to 100-150 milliseconds, was confirmed via a governance vote with overwhelming support, positioning Solana as a top-speed execution layer amid its strong DEX volume ($117B, doubling Ethereum's $52B) despite recent price declines.[2][3
